ModMetaData.name: Concord Coexistence Harmony Breaker
ModMetaData.author: cryptiklemur
ModMetaData.description: In-game coexistence test harness mod. Applies a non-composable Harmony transpiler (fault-block exception region) on the shared target AFTER Concord has already routed it through the bridge, to prove graceful degrade. Not for workshop distribution.
